sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on the player
# Compare previous_frame to current_frame
prev_ascii = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n')
curr_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

changed_rows = []
for r in range(64):
    if prev_ascii[r] != curr_ascii[r]:
        changed_rows.append(r)
        
print(f"Changed rows: {changed_rows}")
for r in changed_rows:
    print(f"  Row {r}: prev={prev_ascii[r][:70]}...")
    print(f"  Row {r}: curr={curr_ascii[r][:70]}...")

# Also check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['b', 'Y']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Player part: color={n['color']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
